name: Hyland OnBase & Content Services API
what_it_does: Hyland OnBase REST APIs for enterprise content management and workflow automation platform. Enables AI agents to manage document storage, retrieval, and metadata management for enterprise content governance, handle workflow and process automation for AP, HR, and case management, access healthcare clinical document management via Hyland Healthcare solutions, retrieve legal case management and court document data for justice and government content management, handle document capture and intelligent data extraction for business process automation, access records management and retention policy data for information governance compliance, retrieve student record and education document management data for higher education, manage process and case management workflow data for operational automation, handle integration with Epic, Meditech, and EHR systems for healthcare document management, and integrate content management data with ERP, HRIS, and line-of-business applications.
use_cases: Automating AP invoice processing from capture and workflow agents
Managing healthcare clinical documents from EHR integration agents
Processing HR onboarding documents from workflow automation agents
Retrieving court case documents from justice management agents
not_for: Simple cloud file storage without enterprise ECM workflow requirements
SMB document management without enterprise compliance and governance
Consumer applications without institutional content management
best_when: A healthcare organization, government agency, financial institution, or large enterprise using Hyland OnBase wants AI agents to automate document capture, workflow processing, records management, and content integration with core business systems.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: OnBase manages regulated records and legal hold data — automated records disposition without records manager and legal review creates compliance exposure. Healthcare clinical document automation must maintain HIPAA compliance for PHI. Government records automation must comply with federal and state records retention requirements. AP workflow automation must preserve audit trail and segregation of duties controls.

auth.notes: Hyland uses OAuth 2.0 (Hyland Identity Service). Developer portal at developer.hyland.com. Westlake, Ohio HQ. Private (Thoma Bravo portfolio). OnBase is the flagship ECM product. Hyland acquired Nuxeo (2021), Alfresco (2020), Lexmark Enterprise Software (2017), and others. Strong in healthcare ECM (Epic-integrated), higher education, and government. OnBase has large on-premise installed base. Competes with OpenText and Laserfiche for ECM market.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by deployment, module, and user count
pricing.notes: Westlake, Ohio. Founded 1991. Private (Thoma Bravo). 20,000+ organizations globally. OnBase flagship ECM product. Healthcare: 2,000+ hospital systems. Government: 500+ government organizations. Higher education: 400+ institutions. Acquired Alfresco (2020), Nuxeo (2021). Strong Epic EHR integration for healthcare clinical documents. Competes with OpenText and Laserfiche for enterprise ECM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; deployment and module dependent

known_agent_gotchas: COMPLIANCE RISK: OnBase records disposition requires retention schedule and legal hold review; automated deletion or destruction without governance review creates legal and regulatory violations
Healthcare PHI compliance — Hyland OnBase in healthcare contains HIPAA-protected PHI; automated document processing must maintain PHI access controls and audit trail
On-premise vs. cloud deployment — OnBase has large on-premise installed base; cloud deployment (Hyland Cloud) and on-premise API endpoints differ; verify deployment type
Thoma Bravo acquisition portfolio — Hyland acquired Alfresco and Nuxeo; these products have separate API surfaces and documentation from OnBase; clarify which product is in scope
OnBase Unity API vs. REST API — OnBase has older Unity API (.NET) alongside newer REST API; some workflows may require Unity API for full functionality
Government records compliance — government OnBase deployments may have NARA, DoD 5015.2, or state-specific records management requirements; verify regulatory framework for your deployment
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise content management. SOC2, ISO27001, HIPAA, GDPR, FedRAMP. OAuth2. US/EU. Healthcare clinical and enterprise document data.

security_score_components.security_notes: ECM platform. SOC2, HIPAA, FedRAMP, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Healthcare and enterprise content data.
